title: hedeoma pusilla
intro: Hedeoma pusilla, also known as prairie balm or false pennyroyal, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and clusters of tiny white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for relieving respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Hedeoma pusilla include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, Hedeoma pusilla can be found in teas, salves, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
